canonical_answer: A man wearing a red baseball cap backwards and a navy blue henley shirt stands in a kitchen wearing a gold chain necklace. He gestures with his hands while speaking in front of white cabinets with glass doors and a stainless steel microwave visible against a black and white checkered tile backsplash. A white blender sits on the counter to his left.

question: Describe what is happening
canonical_answer: A person pours clear liquid from a dark glass bottle into a black non-stick frying pan on an electric cooktop. Chopped red onions and minced garlic are added to the hot oil and stirred together with a wooden spatula as they sauté. Text overlays identify the ingredients as olive oil, garlic, and red onion in English and Spanish.

question: Describe the visual sequence from the start of the video until the recipe title is fully displayed.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a black container with glazed meat and lemon is shown; at 2s, hands hold the container steady on a wooden surface; at 6s, a man in a red cap appears in a kitchen; at 8s, recipe title text overlays appear at the bottom left.

question: Describe the sequence of text overlays and host appearances during the introduction.
canonical_answer: At 2s, white text overlay reads 'BIENVENIDOS' over the food; at 6s, the host gestures with his right hand raised; at 8s, text overlay appears at the bottom left with recipe titles; at 12s, the main recipe title reads 'TAMARIND SALMON & CITRUS QUINOA'.
